global_aesthetic: Old Money Tech. A premium blend of academic heritage (serifs, deep tones) and high-performance SaaS (clean lines, modular grids). Think Framer/Linear quality tailored for an elite Indian international school.

rules: NO Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans. Banned.
Headings > 32px MUST use tracking-tight and specific weights (font-black or font-light).
Data, PRNs, Class IDs, and numeric tables MUST use JetBrains Mono.
Use 'Tinted Grey' rule: never pure black or gray, always tint with the base hue.
Hover state color MUST be explicitly set (e.g., hover:bg-primary/90 hover:text-white).

motion_and_animations.global_fps: Ensure 60 FPS by using hardware-accelerated transforms (transform, opacity only).

patterns.hero: Aurora light gradient background using CSS keyframes, Staggered text reveal (y:20 to 0, opacity 0 to 1), magnetic hover CTAs.
patterns.dashboard_cards: Staggered fade-in on mount. Hover state: y: -4px, scale: 1.01, subtle shadow glow (shadow-xl shadow-primary/10).
patterns.attendance_cells: Flash green/red on click using rapid CSS animation, strict grid layout.
patterns.leave_management: Trigger canvas-confetti upon 'Approved' status state change.
patterns.cursor: Custom animated cursor using framer-motion, following mouse position with spring physics.

component_recipes.navbar: Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 (light) or bg-black/60 (dark), 1px bottom border border-black/5. Sticky top, z-50. NO fully transparent backgrounds.
component_recipes.dashboard_kpi_card: Flat surface, 1px border. On hover: slight lift, border color transitions to primary, shadow-lg.
component_recipes.empty_states: Minimalist illustrations or icons, with a clear Next Best Action CTA.
component_recipes.floating_label_forms: Input wrappers with relative positioning. Label absolute, transitions -translate-y-4 scale-75 on focus or when populated.
component_recipes.timetable_slot: Use react-beautiful-dnd. Draggable blocks with 'grab' cursor. Background changes on drag.

image_urls.description: Modern school building campus exterior at twilight.
Teacher engaging students in modern classroom.
Modern library interior with stairs and reading space.

instructions_to_main_agent.routing: Create a hybrid React app with React Router. Public routes for Marketing (Home, About, Admission). Protected routes (/dashboard) for Admin, Teacher, Parent, Accountant.
instructions_to_main_agent.role_based_logic: Mock authentication but enforce UI separation. E.g., Parents see 'Paid/Pending' for Fees but NO raw amounts. Admin sees full analytics.
instructions_to_main_agent.styling: Use Tailwind CSS. Avoid centering everything; use optical alignment and negative space (p-8 to p-12).
instructions_to_main_agent.data_testing: Add data-testid to EVERY interactive element (buttons, forms, links, cards).

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Break this. Do not make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, or uniform styling.
Never use Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 for icons. Use lucide-react.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) with a 1px border. Never fully transparent.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations. Static = dead.
ALWAYS explicitly assign colors on hover. NEVER use generic transition-all. Use transform and opacity specifically.
Ensure the JSON data-testid attributes are kebab-case and role-based.
